roadmap.title: Learn the four characters and clear every Act boss
roadmap.description: Use unseeded Standard runs to record each character's first Act III victory, defeat all nine rotating bosses, and collect the easy combat and mode achievements.

roadmap.title: Build specialist engines and complete every Ending
roadmap.description: Use focused Ironclad, Silent, and Defect decks for threshold achievements, unlock the three Keys, then defeat the Corrupt Heart with all four characters.

roadmap.title: Finish restricted victories and the Ascension climb
roadmap.description: Attempt the five-card, Common-only, one-Relic, and sub-20-minute victories after all unlocks are available, then win sequential Ascensions through level 20.

roadmap.title: Collect the automatic completion achievement
roadmap.description: Verify the other 45 achievements so Eternal One can register as the final unlock.

achievements.description: Win a battle with 1 HP remaining.
achievements.summary: Finish any combat at exactly @mechanic{1 HP} and take the victory reward.

guide.context: Only the HP value after the last enemy dies matters, so Block can be used to tune the final incoming hit without preventing the unlock.

steps.text: Enter a low-risk Standard combat, leave one enemy alive, and compare its shown damage with your current HP and available Block.
Use enough Block, Weak, or healing control so the enemy's attack leaves the character at exactly 1 HP.
Kill the final enemy while still at 1 HP and proceed to the combat reward screen.

achievements.description: Have 3 or fewer cards in hand, draw, and discard pile combined.
achievements.summary: After floor 3, reduce the combined cards in your @mechanic{hand, draw pile, and discard pile to three or fewer} during combat.

guide.context: Exhausted cards and cards held outside those three zones do not count, so a small deck or an Ironclad Exhaust engine can meet the threshold before combat ends.

steps.text: Use card-removal services and avoid unnecessary rewards so the run has a compact deck, preferably with Ironclad Exhaust cards such as Fiend Fire or Sever Soul.
Start a combat on floor 4 or later and keep one manageable enemy alive.
Play and Exhaust cards until the total visible across the hand, draw pile, and discard pile is three or fewer.

achievements.description: Win a combat without playing an Attack.
achievements.summary: Win a Standard combat without playing any @mechanic{Attack card}; damage from Skills, Powers, Potions, Relics, Poison, or Orbs is allowed.

guide.context: The Defect starts combat with a Lightning Orb, making an early enemy a reliable target because passive Orb damage does not count as playing an Attack.

steps.text: Start an unseeded Standard run as the Defect; take Neow's Lament if it is offered to reduce the first three enemies to 1 HP.
In an early combat, play only Defend cards or other non-Attacks.
Let the starting Lightning Orb or another non-Attack damage source kill the final enemy.

achievements.description: Exhaust 20 cards in a single combat.
achievements.summary: Use Ironclad Exhaust effects to @mechanic{Exhaust 20 cards in one combat} before killing the last enemy.

guide.context: Exhaust removes a card for the rest of the current combat; a larger deck and a durable enemy provide enough material and time for the counter.

steps.text: Draft several Ironclad cards that Exhaust cards, especially Fiend Fire and Sever Soul, while retaining enough defense to prolong combat.
Enter a combat against an enemy whose incoming damage can be blocked consistently.
Cycle the deck and use Exhaust effects until 20 cards have entered the Exhaust pile during that combat.

achievements.description: Have 9 Energy during a single turn of combat.
achievements.summary: Accumulate at least @mechanic{9 Energy at the same time during one combat turn}.

guide.context: Ice Cream preserves unused Energy between turns; Watcher Miracles and Deus Ex Machina or Defect Plasma and Double Energy can supply the remaining Energy on the target turn.

steps.text: Take Ice Cream when available, or draft Watcher Miracle generators or Defect cards that Channel Plasma and Double Energy.
Keep a safe enemy alive, save Energy with Ice Cream or prepare the needed retained and draw-pile Energy cards.
Generate Energy without spending it until the combat Energy display reaches 9 or more during the turn.

achievements.description: Have 10 or more buffs during combat.
achievements.summary: Hold @mechanic{10 different positive buffs at the same time} during one combat.

guide.context: The Defect's Creative AI can keep generating different Power cards, allowing a long defensive combat to accumulate many persistent buff icons.

steps.text: Build a defensive Defect deck and take Creative AI plus varied Power cards and buff-granting Relics.
Against a low-damage enemy, play Creative AI and block while it adds a random Power to the hand each turn.
Play Powers that create distinct positive status icons until 10 buffs are active simultaneously.

achievements.description: Have 50 or more Strength during combat.
achievements.summary: Raise the character to @mechanic{50 Strength or more} during one combat.

guide.context: Ironclad's Demon Form adds Strength every turn, so a block-heavy deck can reach the threshold by extending a safe fight.

steps.text: As Ironclad, take Demon Form, Inflame, and enough Block cards to survive a long combat.
Play Demon Form early against an enemy whose damage can be blocked consistently.
Continue ending turns and blocking until the Strength counter reaches at least 50.

achievements.description: Have 99 or more Block during combat.
achievements.summary: Reach @mechanic{99 Block or more} at one time during combat.

guide.context: Barricade prevents Block from disappearing at the start of the next turn, while Entrench doubles the Block already accumulated.

steps.text: As Ironclad, obtain Barricade, Entrench, and several efficient Block cards.
Play Barricade against a manageable enemy and build Block over multiple turns.
Use Entrench after accumulating a substantial Block total until the display reaches at least 99.

achievements.description: Have 999 Block during combat.
achievements.summary: Use a retained-Block engine to reach the @mechanic{999 Block cap} during one combat.

guide.context: Barricade retains Block between turns and repeated Entrench plays double the stored amount, making the cap reachable against an enemy that cannot break the engine.

steps.text: As Ironclad, build around Barricade, Entrench, reliable card draw, and enough Block to become damage-proof.
Choose a low-scaling enemy, play Barricade, and establish more Block per cycle than the enemy removes.
Cycle and replay Entrench while adding Block until the counter reaches 999.

achievements.description: Apply 99 or more Poison on a single enemy.
achievements.summary: Apply @mechanic{99 Poison or more to one enemy} during a Silent combat.

guide.context: An upgraded Catalyst triples the target's current Poison; starting from 11 Poison and resolving two Catalyst+ cards reaches 99 exactly.

steps.text: As the Silent, obtain and upgrade two Catalyst cards while drafting reliable Poison application and card draw.
Against a durable enemy, apply at least 11 Poison and keep the enemy alive.
Play both Catalyst+ cards on that enemy before Poison damage kills it, raising the stack to at least 99.

achievements.description: Defeat 3 enemies with Poison in a single combat.
achievements.summary: In one combat with at least three enemies, apply Poison to three enemies and let @mechanic{Poison deliver the killing blow to each enemy}.

guide.context: Poison must deal each target's final damage; direct attacks can lower enemy HP, but they should stop before taking a required killing blow.

steps.text: As the Silent, draft enough Poison application to affect several targets in the same fight; Corpse Explosion can support the setup, but each required target must have Poison.
Enter a normal or Elite combat containing at least three enemies.
Apply Poison to three enemies, stop direct damage before they die, and defend until Poison removes all three during that combat.

achievements.description: Play 10 Shivs in a single turn.
achievements.summary: Play @mechanic{10 Shiv cards during a single turn} as the Silent.

guide.context: Blade Dance+ creates four Shivs, so three upgraded copies produce enough Shivs if the turn has the Energy and hand space to play them all.

steps.text: As the Silent, collect and upgrade multiple Blade Dance cards; Cloak and Dagger and Infinite Blades can supply additional Shivs.
Enter a safe combat with three Blade Dance+ cards available, at least 3 Energy, and enough hand space for generated Shivs.
Generate and play Shivs without ending the turn until 10 Shiv cards have been played.

achievements.description: Play 25 cards in a single turn.
achievements.summary: Use a draw-and-Energy loop to @mechanic{play 25 cards in one turn}.

guide.context: Two Dropkick cards can loop after Vulnerable is applied when the remaining draw and discard cycle is small enough: each Dropkick draws the other and refunds its Energy.

steps.text: As Ironclad, obtain two Dropkick cards, a reliable Vulnerable source, and remove or Exhaust enough other cards to make the pair cycle.
Against a durable enemy, apply Vulnerable and clear the other cards from the active draw and discard cycle.
Alternate the two Dropkicks while Vulnerable remains until at least 25 cards have been played that turn.

achievements.description: Defeat a boss on turn 1.
achievements.summary: Defeat any Act boss during @mechanic{turn 1}; killing the Awakened One's first phase on turn 1 also qualifies.

guide.context: A compact Dropkick loop or another first-turn infinite removes the boss before it can act, and an Act I boss has the lowest health requirement.

steps.text: Build a compact deck that can draw its complete damage-and-Energy loop immediately, such as two Dropkicks plus a Vulnerable source.
Preserve the combo through Act I and enter the floor 16 boss encounter.
On the opening turn, establish the loop and deal the boss's full health before pressing End Turn.

achievements.description: Defeat a boss without taking any damage.
achievements.summary: Defeat a normal Act boss without @mechanic{losing HP to the boss or its effects during that combat}.

guide.context: HP loss from the character's own cards does not invalidate the achievement, but the Act I boss fought through Mind Bloom does not count.

steps.text: Prepare a deck with reliable Block, Weak, Intangible, or rapid scaling before a normal act-ending boss.
During the boss encounter, block or avoid every incoming point of enemy attack damage.
Kill the boss without the boss reducing the character's HP.

achievements.description: Defeat the Guardian.
achievements.summary: Reach Act I floor 16 on a Standard run and defeat @enemy{The Guardian}.

guide.context: The Guardian changes to Defensive Mode after enough damage; stop multi-hit attacks while Sharp Hide is active and block the return attacks.

steps.text: Start an unseeded Standard run and check the Act I boss portrait for The Guardian.
Build damage, Block, and scaling suited to The Guardian while climbing to floor 16.
Win the complete boss encounter against The Guardian.

achievements.description: Defeat Hexaghost.
achievements.summary: Reach Act I floor 16 on a Standard run and defeat @enemy{Hexaghost}.

guide.context: Hexaghost adds Burns and eventually repeats its large Inferno sequence, so scale damage while blocking the early multi-hit pattern.

steps.text: Start an unseeded Standard run and check the Act I boss portrait for Hexaghost.
Build damage, Block, and scaling suited to Hexaghost while climbing to floor 16.
Win the complete boss encounter against Hexaghost.

achievements.description: Defeat the Slime Boss.
achievements.summary: Reach Act I floor 16 on a Standard run and defeat @enemy{Slime Boss}.

guide.context: Slime Boss splits at half health; push it from just above the threshold to as low as possible before the split, then use area damage on the smaller slimes.

steps.text: Start an unseeded Standard run and check the Act I boss portrait for Slime Boss.
Build damage, Block, and scaling suited to Slime Boss while climbing to floor 16.
Win the complete boss encounter against Slime Boss.

achievements.description: Defeat the Bronze Automaton.
achievements.summary: Reach Act II floor 33 on a Standard run and defeat @enemy{Bronze Automaton}.

guide.context: Bronze Orbs steal cards and return them when destroyed; recover the cards before Hyper Beam and prepare enough Block for that attack.

steps.text: Start an unseeded Standard run and check the Act II boss portrait for Bronze Automaton.
Build damage, Block, and scaling suited to Bronze Automaton while climbing to floor 33.
Win the complete boss encounter against Bronze Automaton.

achievements.description: Defeat the Collector.
achievements.summary: Reach Act II floor 33 on a Standard run and defeat @enemy{The Collector}.

guide.context: The Collector summons Torch Heads and applies a multi-debuff; area damage controls the minions while focused damage ends the boss before repeated summons overwhelm the deck.

steps.text: Start an unseeded Standard run and check the Act II boss portrait for The Collector.
Build damage, Block, and scaling suited to The Collector while climbing to floor 33.
Win the complete boss encounter against The Collector.

achievements.description: Defeat the Champ.
achievements.summary: Reach Act II floor 33 on a Standard run and defeat @enemy{The Champ}.

guide.context: The Champ clears debuffs and becomes much more dangerous after dropping low, so establish scaling above that threshold and finish the second half quickly.

steps.text: Start an unseeded Standard run and check the Act II boss portrait for The Champ.
Build damage, Block, and scaling suited to The Champ while climbing to floor 33.
Win the complete boss encounter against The Champ.

achievements.description: Defeat the Awakened One.
achievements.summary: Reach Act III floor 50 on a Standard run and defeat @enemy{Awakened One}.

guide.context: Awakened One gains Strength when Powers are played and revives for a second phase; play essential Powers carefully and reserve enough defense for the revived form.

steps.text: Start an unseeded Standard run and check the Act III boss portrait for Awakened One.
Build damage, Block, and scaling suited to Awakened One while climbing to floor 50.
Win the complete boss encounter against Awakened One.

achievements.description: Defeat Donu and Deca.
achievements.summary: Reach Act III floor 50 on a Standard run and defeat @enemy{Donu and Deca}.

guide.context: Donu increases both enemies' Strength while Deca adds defense, so concentrating damage on one target prevents their scaling from compounding.

steps.text: Start an unseeded Standard run and check the Act III boss portrait for Donu and Deca.
Build damage, Block, and scaling suited to Donu and Deca while climbing to floor 50.
Win the complete boss encounter against Donu and Deca.

achievements.description: Defeat the Time Eater.
achievements.summary: Reach Act III floor 50 on a Standard run and defeat @enemy{Time Eater}.

guide.context: Time Eater ends the turn whenever the 12-card counter fills; plan each turn around the visible counter instead of leaving unused Energy when the limit triggers.

steps.text: Start an unseeded Standard run and check the Act III boss portrait for Time Eater.
Build damage, Block, and scaling suited to Time Eater while climbing to floor 50.
Win the complete boss encounter against Time Eater.

achievements.description: Beat the game with the Ironclad.
achievements.summary: Use the @npc{Ironclad} to defeat the Act III boss without carrying the Ruby, Emerald, and Sapphire Keys together into Act IV.

guide.context: Defeating Act III counts as a run victory only when at least one Key is missing; collecting all three postpones victory until the Corrupt Heart is defeated.

steps.text: Ironclad is available from the first save-file run.
Select Ironclad for an unseeded Standard run.
Do not collect all three of the Ruby, Emerald, and Sapphire Keys during the run.
Climb through all three acts and defeat the Act III boss to record the character victory.

achievements.description: Beat the game with the Silent.
achievements.summary: Use the @npc{Silent} to defeat the Act III boss without carrying the Ruby, Emerald, and Sapphire Keys together into Act IV.

guide.context: Defeating Act III counts as a run victory only when at least one Key is missing; collecting all three postpones victory until the Corrupt Heart is defeated.

steps.text: Complete any Ironclad run, even a loss, to unlock Silent.
Select Silent for an unseeded Standard run.
Do not collect all three of the Ruby, Emerald, and Sapphire Keys during the run.
Climb through all three acts and defeat the Act III boss to record the character victory.

achievements.description: Beat the game with a single relic.
achievements.summary: Defeat the Act III boss with @mechanic{exactly one Relic total}, counting the character's starting Relic or its replacement.

guide.context: Replacing the starting Relic with a Boss Relic still leaves one total, but Neow's Lament adds a second Relic and invalidates the restriction.

steps.text: Begin an unseeded Standard run and keep the starting Relic, or choose Neow's option that replaces it with one Boss Relic.
Skip every Elite, chest, event, shop, and boss Relic reward; avoid any option that automatically grants another Relic.
Before the Act III boss, verify the Relic bar contains exactly one icon, then defeat that boss without collecting all three Keys.

achievements.description: Beat the game in under 20 minutes.
achievements.summary: Enable @mechanic{Fast Mode} and defeat the Act III boss in an unseeded Standard run before the timer reaches @mechanic{20:00}.

guide.context: Act IV is unnecessary, and avoiding Elites, long events, and complex reward decisions saves more time than attempting a slow high-value route.

steps.text: Open Settings before the run and enable `Fast Mode` to shorten combat animations.
Use a familiar character, favor direct combat paths, skip optional Elites and lengthy deck decisions, and build immediate area damage.
Leave at least one Key uncollected and defeat the Act III boss before the run timer reaches 20 minutes.

achievements.description: Beat the game with a 5 card deck or smaller.
achievements.summary: Defeat the Act III boss with @mechanic{five or fewer permanent cards in the deck}.

guide.context: Merchant removal, removal events, and Peace Pipe can shrink the deck; a compact Watcher Pressure Points deck or Ironclad Dropkick loop can still supply enough damage.

steps.text: Start an unseeded Standard run and take very few card rewards, keeping only cards required for a compact win condition.
Route through Merchants and card-removal events, spending Gold to remove starter cards until the deck counter is five or lower.
Leave at least one Key uncollected and defeat the Act III boss while the permanent deck contains no more than five cards.

achievements.description: Finish Donu with a Feed.
achievements.summary: As Ironclad, use @item{Feed} to deal the killing blow to @enemy{Donu} during the Donu and Deca boss fight.

guide.context: Feed Exhausts after use, and Donu and Deca are only one of three possible Act III bosses, so preserve Feed and Donu's final health for the Fatal hit.

steps.text: As Ironclad, take a Feed card and keep it in the deck through Acts I and II.
Reach Act III on a run whose boss portrait shows Donu and Deca.
During the boss fight, target Donu, reduce Donu to Feed's displayed damage or less, and play Feed for the killing blow.

achievements.description: Unlock Ascension mode.
achievements.summary: Defeat an Act III boss with any character to unlock that character's @mechanic{Ascension selector}.

guide.context: Ascension progress is separate for each character, and defeating the Corrupt Heart or entering Act IV is not required to unlock the next level.

steps.text: Start an unseeded Standard run with the character whose Ascension ladder you want to use.
Leave at least one Key uncollected and defeat the Act III boss.
Return to character select and verify that the Ascension checkbox and level selector are available for that character.

achievements.description: Complete Ascension Level 10.
achievements.summary: Select @mechanic{Ascension 10} on one character and defeat the Act III boss at that level.

guide.context: Each completed Ascension unlocks the next level only for that character; Ascension 10 also adds Ascender's Bane to the starting deck.

steps.text: Use one preferred character and defeat the Act III boss at Ascension levels 1 through 9 in order.
On character select, enable Ascension and set the unlocked level to 10.
Leave at least one Key uncollected and defeat the Act III boss on Ascension 10.

achievements.description: Beat the game with the Defect.
achievements.summary: Use the @npc{Defect} to defeat the Act III boss without carrying the Ruby, Emerald, and Sapphire Keys together into Act IV.

guide.context: Defeating Act III counts as a run victory only when at least one Key is missing; collecting all three postpones victory until the Corrupt Heart is defeated.

steps.text: Complete any Silent run, even a loss, to unlock Defect.
Select Defect for an unseeded Standard run.
Do not collect all three of the Ruby, Emerald, and Sapphire Keys during the run.
Climb through all three acts and defeat the Act III boss to record the character victory.

achievements.description: Beat the game with a deck containing no uncommons or rares.
achievements.summary: Defeat the Act III boss with @mechanic{no Uncommon or Rare cards in the permanent deck}; Basic, Common, Curse, and Special cards are allowed.

guide.context: The deck is checked only when victory registers, so generated combat cards do not count and any forbidden card removed before the final boss no longer invalidates the run.

steps.text: Start an unseeded Standard run and build around Common cards, such as Ironclad Perfected Strike or Watcher Pressure Points.
Skip Uncommon and Rare card rewards, or remove every such card before the Act III boss; inspect the deck to confirm none remain.
Leave at least one Key uncollected and defeat the Act III boss with the compliant deck.

achievements.description: Have 25 or more Focus during combat.
achievements.summary: Raise the Defect to @mechanic{25 Focus or more} during one combat.

guide.context: Consume can be replayed after adding Orb slots with Capacitor or Inserter; Biased Cognition also supplies Focus, and Artifact prevents its Focus-loss debuff only when active first.

steps.text: As the Defect, obtain Consume with Orb-slot support, or collect multiple Defragment and Biased Cognition cards plus an Artifact source.
Enter a combat that can be stalled and establish enough Block to cycle the deck repeatedly.
Replay Consume or stack the other Focus effects until the Focus counter reaches at least 25.

achievements.description: Channel 9 Plasma in a single turn.
achievements.summary: As the Defect, @mechanic{Channel nine Plasma during one turn}; one reproducible line is Echo Form plus two Meteor Strike resolutions and one more Meteor Strike.

guide.context: Meteor Strike Channels three Plasma, Echo Form repeats the first card played each turn, and the resulting Plasma Evokes can fund Hologram+ retrieving Meteor Strike for the ninth Channel.

steps.text: Draft Meteor Strike, Echo Form, Hologram+, and enough Energy generation to pay Meteor Strike's initial 5 Energy; Nuclear Battery and Double Energy help start the line.
In a durable combat, play Echo Form on an earlier turn and retain or draw Meteor Strike and Hologram+ together.

Make Meteor Strike the first card of the target turn so Echo Form resolves it twice for six Plasma, use Hologram+ to return Meteor Strike from the discard pile, then play it again for three more Plasma.

achievements.description: Win a Daily Climb.
achievements.summary: Open @mechanic{Daily Climb}, use the day's fixed character and modifiers, and defeat the Act III boss.

guide.context: Daily Climb changes once per day and uses a shared seeded challenge; this is the achievement intended for that mode.

steps.text: From the main menu, open `Daily Climb` while connected so the current challenge loads.
Review the displayed character and modifiers, then build around the advantages and restrictions they create.
Complete all three acts and defeat the Daily Climb's Act III boss.

achievements.description: Defeat the Transient before it fades away.
achievements.summary: Find @enemy{The Transient in Act III} and reduce its @mechanic{999 HP to zero within five turns}, before it fades away.

guide.context: An infinite card loop, very high Ironclad Strength, or rapidly multiplied Silent Poison can supply the required burst; merely surviving until the enemy disappears does not count.

steps.text: Build a deck capable of dealing roughly 200 damage per turn or an infinite loop before entering Act III.
Take normal enemy rooms in Act III until The Transient appears.
Use the complete damage engine immediately and remove all 999 HP before the fifth turn ends.

achievements.description: Complete Ascension Level 20.
achievements.summary: Select @mechanic{Ascension 20} on one character and defeat both consecutive Act III bosses.

guide.context: Ascension modifiers are cumulative, and level 20 adds a second, different Act III boss immediately after the first.

steps.text: Continue winning with the same character at Ascension levels 11 through 19 to unlock level 20.
Enable Ascension 20 at character select and build a deck with enough health, scaling, and flexibility for two boss matchups.
Leave at least one Key uncollected, then defeat both Act III bosses in sequence on Ascension 20.

achievements.description: Complete the Ending with the Ironclad.
achievements.summary: With the @npc{Ironclad}, collect the Ruby, Emerald, and Sapphire Keys in one run and defeat the @enemy{Corrupt Heart} in Act IV.

guide.context: Act IV becomes available after Act III victories with Ironclad, Silent, and Defect; all three Keys must be carried past the Act III boss in the same run.

steps.text: Record an Act III victory with Ironclad, Silent, and Defect so the three Key slots appear on later runs.
As Ironclad, choose `Recall` at a Rest Site for the Ruby Key, defeat the burning Elite for the Emerald Key, and take the Sapphire Key instead of a chest Relic.
Defeat the Act III boss while carrying all three Keys, then defeat the Spire Shield and Spire Spear in Act IV.
Defeat the Corrupt Heart to complete the Ending with Ironclad.

achievements.description: Complete the Ending with the Silent.
achievements.summary: With the @npc{Silent}, collect the Ruby, Emerald, and Sapphire Keys in one run and defeat the @enemy{Corrupt Heart} in Act IV.

guide.context: Act IV becomes available after Act III victories with Ironclad, Silent, and Defect; all three Keys must be carried past the Act III boss in the same run.

steps.text: Record an Act III victory with Ironclad, Silent, and Defect so the three Key slots appear on later runs.
As Silent, choose `Recall` at a Rest Site for the Ruby Key, defeat the burning Elite for the Emerald Key, and take the Sapphire Key instead of a chest Relic.
Defeat the Act III boss while carrying all three Keys, then defeat the Spire Shield and Spire Spear in Act IV.
Defeat the Corrupt Heart to complete the Ending with Silent.

achievements.description: Complete the Ending with the Defect.
achievements.summary: With the @npc{Defect}, collect the Ruby, Emerald, and Sapphire Keys in one run and defeat the @enemy{Corrupt Heart} in Act IV.

guide.context: Act IV becomes available after Act III victories with Ironclad, Silent, and Defect; all three Keys must be carried past the Act III boss in the same run.

steps.text: Record an Act III victory with Ironclad, Silent, and Defect so the three Key slots appear on later runs.
As Defect, choose `Recall` at a Rest Site for the Ruby Key, defeat the burning Elite for the Emerald Key, and take the Sapphire Key instead of a chest Relic.
Defeat the Act III boss while carrying all three Keys, then defeat the Spire Shield and Spire Spear in Act IV.
Defeat the Corrupt Heart to complete the Ending with Defect.

achievements.description: Complete the Ending with the Ironclad, Silent, and Defect.
achievements.summary: Defeat the @enemy{Corrupt Heart once each with Ironclad, Silent, and Defect} after collecting the Ruby, Emerald, and Sapphire Keys on each run.

guide.context: Each character's Ending is tracked separately, so three complete Act IV victories are required even though the Key route is identical.

steps.text: Collect all three Keys and defeat the Corrupt Heart with Ironclad.
Collect all three Keys and defeat the Corrupt Heart with Silent.
Collect all three Keys and defeat the Corrupt Heart with Defect.

achievements.description: Obtain all other Achievements.
achievements.summary: Unlock @mechanic{all 45 other Steam achievements} in Slay the Spire; Eternal One then unlocks automatically.

guide.context: Eternal One has no independent run condition and includes both Watcher achievements in the current 46-achievement list.

steps.text: Open the in-game Statistics achievement page or Steam list and verify every achievement except Eternal One is unlocked.
Return to the main menu or complete the final outstanding run so the game and Steam evaluate the full set.

achievements.description: Beat the game with the Watcher.
achievements.summary: Use the @npc{Watcher} to defeat the Act III boss without carrying the Ruby, Emerald, and Sapphire Keys together into Act IV.

guide.context: Defeating Act III counts as a run victory only when at least one Key is missing; collecting all three postpones victory until the Corrupt Heart is defeated.

steps.text: Defeat the Act III boss in an unseeded run with Ironclad, Silent, or Defect to unlock Watcher.
Select Watcher for an unseeded Standard run.
Do not collect all three of the Ruby, Emerald, and Sapphire Keys during the run.
Climb through all three acts and defeat the Act III boss to record the character victory.

achievements.description: Complete the Ending with the Watcher.
achievements.summary: With the @npc{Watcher}, collect the Ruby, Emerald, and Sapphire Keys in one run and defeat the @enemy{Corrupt Heart} in Act IV.

guide.context: Act IV becomes available after Act III victories with Ironclad, Silent, and Defect; all three Keys must be carried past the Act III boss in the same run.

steps.text: Record an Act III victory with Ironclad, Silent, and Defect so the three Key slots appear on later runs.
As Watcher, choose `Recall` at a Rest Site for the Ruby Key, defeat the burning Elite for the Emerald Key, and take the Sapphire Key instead of a chest Relic.
Defeat the Act III boss while carrying all three Keys, then defeat the Spire Shield and Spire Spear in Act IV.
Defeat the Corrupt Heart to complete the Ending with Watcher.
